report.summary: Community v6 cycle: Drafted 5 tweets (#198-202) covering SEC 91 ETF ruling day, Fear & Greed hitting 10 (FTX-level), Bitcoin halving cycle analysis, $13.5B options expiry aftermath, and weekly macro wrap thread. Created Discord/TG evening update and Newsletter v32 section. Designed SVG social card: SEC 91 ETF Ruling Day (1200x630 with stats, fear gauge, regulatory context). 554 pages published per published-pages.ts.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #198: SEC Rules on 91 Crypto ETF Applications — biggest single ruling day in crypto history. 24 tokens, spot + staking + leveraged + multi-asset baskets. Links to crypto-etfs-complete-guide. Scheduled: Fri Mar 28, 9AM ET.

Tweet #199: Fear & Greed Hits 10 — lowest since FTX collapse (Nov 2022). 46-day Extreme Fear streak. Last time fear was this deep, BTC was $16K → $73K in 12 months. Links to fear-greed-timeline. Scheduled: Fri Mar 28, 1PM ET.

Tweet #200: Bitcoin Halving Cycle Analysis — 703 days past Apr 2024 halving, historical bottoms at ~day 777. Potential cycle bottom late May 2026. 44% below ATH. Links to bitcoin-halving-guide. Scheduled: Sat Mar 29, 11AM ET.

Tweet #201: $13.5B Options Expiry Aftermath — largest quarterly settlement of 2026. Gamma normalization, volatility compression, breakout probability increasing. Coincided with SEC 91 ETF ruling. Links to options-calculator. Scheduled: Sat Mar 29, 4PM ET.
Tweet #202: Weekly Macro Wrap Thread (5 parts) — SEC 91 ETFs, BTC $66.2K low, Fear at 10, Iran day 28, 16 commodity classifications, $13.5B expiry, halving day 703. Scheduled: Sun Mar 30, 12PM ET.

Discord/TG: Evening Update — BTC $66,587, ETH $2,047, XRP $1.35, F&G 10. SEC 91 ETFs, $13.5B options expiry, Iran day 28, halving day 703. Tool links for fear-greed-timeline, dca-calculator, options-calculator, risk-analyzer.
Newsletter v32 Section — Subject: 'SEC Rules on 91 Crypto ETFs + Fear Hits FTX Levels'. Market pulse, top tools for the moment, worth reading section, degen corner with halving cycle analysis.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: SEC 91 ETF Ruling Day (1200x630) — Dark glass-morphism design with HISTORIC RULING badge. Headline: 'SEC Rules on 91 Crypto ETFs / Biggest Single Ruling Day in History'. 4 stat cards: 91 ETF Applications (single-day record), 24 Tokens Covered (BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, ADA...), BTC $66,587 (-4%), F&G 10 (46-day streak). Fear gauge bar at 10%. Context panel: 16 commodity classifications, $13.5B options expiry, 703 days post-halving. CTA linking crypto-etfs-complete-guide. Saved to reports/community-drafts/2026-03-27-social-card-sec-91-etfs.svg
